text.title: Agent Customer-Zero Pilot Protocol Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether agent-customer-zero-pilot-protocol applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this a customer-zero pilot for a vertical agent?

branch.when: yes AND no kill switch yet
not a pilot, just one-off engagement

example.description: When `yes` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
